expectations.text: Response provides or references the getHolidayDescription function
expectations.evidence: No function name provided. Response explains the concept and API but doesn't define any ARE-compatible function.

expectations.text: Response shows the Wikipedia REST API endpoint pattern
expectations.evidence: 'https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/page/summary/Rosh_Hashanah' -- correctly identifies the Wikipedia REST API summary endpoint
No mention of any WIKIPEDIA_ARTICLE_MAP or lookup structure. Without the map, a developer would need to manually manage article title normalization (e.g., 'Rosh Hashana' vs 'Rosh_Hashanah').

expectations.text: Response specifies the exact attribution text: 'Description via Wikipedia (CC BY-SA 3.0)'
expectations.evidence: Without-skill says 'From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia' (Wikipedia's own attribution phrase) not 'Description via Wikipedia (CC BY-SA 3.0)' (the ARE-standard string). Different text -- would need to be updated to match the ARE standard.

needs_review: Attribution string mismatch: 'From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia' vs 'Description via Wikipedia (CC BY-SA 3.0)'. The ARE string is more specific and includes the license -- important for legal compliance.
